title: pelargonium ellipticum
intro: Pelargonium ellipticum, also known as the Round-Leaf Geranium, is a species of flowering plant native to southern Africa. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, digestive problems, and respiratory issues. The plant's leaves and stems contain compounds with anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to reduce inflammation and protect against cell damage, offering health benefits such as improved cardiovascular health and immune system function. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of Pelargonium ellipticum can be made into teas, infusions, or extracts, and are often used in traditional medicine to support overall well-being.
